entity.summary: Mantle automated-market-maker decentralized exchange with residual current liquidity, historical swap volume, and NFT-linked trading and earning features.
entity.notes: DefiLlama identifies FCON DEX as a Mantle AMM DEX and reports residual current TVL, cumulative fees, and cumulative DEX volume while recent fees and 24-hour volume are zero. HEI therefore uses limited rather than active or dead. A stable first-party website URL was not recovered in this review pass.

evidence.title: FCON DEX metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Registry identifies FCON DEX as a Mantle AMM DEX and reports residual current TVL plus cumulative fees and volume while recent fees and 24-hour volume are zero, supporting limited classification.

evidence.title: FCON DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies FCON DEX as a Mantle decentralized exchange.

evidence.title: FCON DEX open-source adapter reference
evidence.notes: Open-source protocol adapter repository provides the implementation basis for the FCON DEX TVL and metric series used for identity and status corroboration.
